summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trade Deals feature. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - Trade Deals panel, CreateTradeModal, action buttons (Accept/Counter/Decline), and History tab all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/trades/incoming - returns list of incoming trades
GET /api/trades/outgoing - returns list of outgoing trades
GET /api/trades/history - returns trades and total count with pagination
GET /api/trades/active-count - returns count for badge display
POST /api/trades - creates trade offer with offering/requesting items and message
Trade appears in proposer's outgoing list
Trade appears in receiver's incoming list
History privacy - users only see own trades
Frontend: Trade Deals nav item visible in sidebar with badge count
Frontend: Trade Deals panel renders with Incoming/Outgoing/History tabs
Frontend: Propose Trade button appears on feed post cards
Frontend: CreateTradeModal opens and allows adding offering/requesting items
Frontend: Trade card expand/collapse with Accept/Counter/Decline buttons
Frontend: History tab shows completed/declined/cancelled trades with status badges
Frontend: Counter-offer history displayed in expanded trade card
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed trade offers during backend testing for CRUD verification - these appear in trade history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Deals feature fully tested and working. The trade_deals MongoDB collection stores all trade offers with Fernet encryption for messages. Frontend TradeDealsPanel has three tabs (Incoming/Outgoing/History). CreateTradeModal and CounterTradeModal work correctly. Action buttons (Accept/Counter/Decline) appear based on trade status and user role. Badge count on sidebar nav shows active incoming trades.

trade_responses.notifications: Push notifications and WebSocket messages sent

trade_history_privacy.description: Users can only see trades where they are proposer or receiver
